data.title: Jeff Bezos Optimistic About Trump's Second Term, Wants To Help Streamline Rules: 'We Do Have Too Many Regulations In This Country'
data.description: On Wednesday, Jeff Bezos expressed optimism about Donald Trump's second term, emphasizing support for reducing regulations while intending to challenge the President-elect's stance on the press, despite their historically contentious relationship.

data.title: Peter Schiff Backs 'Bitcoin Jesus' Roger Ver's Motion To Dismiss Tax Evasion Charges
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff on Wednesday backed early Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) adopter Roger Keith Ver in his fight against U.S. authorities on tax evasion charges.

data.title: Bitcoin Hits Historic $100K Milestone, Michael Saylor Gets Ready For Party
data.description:
On Wednesday, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the world’s largest cryptocurrency, crossed the $100,000 barrier for the first time.



What happened: The prized digital asset resisted pushback from bears to eventually surpass the long-awaited milestone.

data.title: SonarX Partners With Amazon To Integrate On-Chain Datasets Into AWS
data.description: SonarX announced on Wednesday that it has partnered with Amazon's AWS, along with the teams at Base, Arbitrum, Provenance Blockchain, Aptos, and Ripple, to bring its indexed on-chain datasets to AWS's Open Data program.

data.title: Synopsys Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Soft Guidance, Expanding Opportunities Powered By 'AI-Driven Reinvention Of Compute'
data.description: Synopsys reports fourth-quarter financial results after the market close on Wednesday. Here's a rundown of the report.
